meta.title: The Realignment - Ep. 6: Michael Doran on the Failures of the Foreign Policy Elite
meta.description:
Hudson Institute Senior Fellow Michael Doran describes the shifting American foreign policy consensus in both parties and argues that the foreign policy elite has yet to truly reckon with the significance of President Trump’s election.

Subscribe to be notified about new episodes every week:

Spotify: https://spoti.fi/2Kb1kyz
Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-realignment/id1474687988
Google Podcasts: https://bit.ly/2Ox1d4o
Stitcher: https://bit.ly/2OAjqy9

Learn more about The Realignment at: https://www.hudson.org/
